sql: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, (SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users u2 WHERE u2.id = u.id LIMIT 1) as user_info, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND o.status = #{orderStatus}) as order_count FROM users u WHERE u.status = #{status} AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds})
templateSql:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email,
       (SELECT <include refid="Frag_UserBasic"/> FROM users u2 WHERE u2.id = u.id LIMIT 1) as user_info,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id
        <if test="orderStatus != null">
            AND o.status = #{orderStatus}
        </if>
       ) as order_count
FROM users u
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND u.status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND u.department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
